title: VectorForge DataFoundry DIVT Schema
description: Complete schema definitions for Data Integrity Validation Tokens (DIVT) - the core cryptographic data structure used throughout VectorForge DataFoundry.

HashMode.description: Canonicalization mode used for hashing content before signing.

x-enum-descriptions.text_v1: Plain text canonicalization - UTF-8 normalized, BOM stripped, line endings normalized to LF
x-enum-descriptions.json_canon_v1: JSON canonicalization with sorted keys, no floats allowed, integers within safe range (-(2^53-1) to 2^53-1)
x-enum-descriptions.binary_v1: Binary content - raw bytes with no canonicalization, used for non-text data

LedgerStatus.description: Anchoring status in the immutable ledger (ImmuDB).

x-enum-descriptions.pending: DIVT is queued for anchoring, not yet written to ImmuDB
x-enum-descriptions.anchored: DIVT is successfully written to ImmuDB with a transaction ID
x-enum-descriptions.retry: Anchoring failed and will be retried with exponential backoff
x-enum-descriptions.failed: Anchoring permanently failed after maximum retry attempts (typically 5)

CryptoMode.description: Signing mode determining which cryptographic algorithms are used.

x-enum-descriptions.hybrid: Both ECDSA P-521 and ML-DSA-65 signatures for quantum-safe transition

Signatures.description: Hybrid signature pair containing ECDSA and/or PQC signatures.

ecdsa.description: Base64-encoded ECDSA P-521 signature. Present when crypto_mode is 'fips' or 'hybrid'.

pqc.description: Base64-encoded ML-DSA-65 (Dilithium) post-quantum signature. Present when crypto_mode is 'pqc' or 'hybrid'.

key_ver.description: Key version identifier indicating which keypair was used for signing (e.g., 'v1', 'v2').

DIVT.description: Data Integrity Validation Token - the core data structure representing a cryptographically signed content hash.

divt_id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4) for this DIVT.

tenant_id.description: Fixed tenant identifier. Single-tenant mode uses a constant value.

hash_b64.description: Base64-encoded SHA3-512 hash (64 bytes decoded) of the canonicalized content.

signature_version.description: Key version used for signing, links to the signing keypair.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary JSON metadata (max 4KB). NOT included in the hash calculation.

ledger_tx_id.description: ImmuDB transaction ID assigned after successful anchoring. Only present when ledger_status is 'anchored'.

revoked.description: Whether this DIVT has been revoked.

revoked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when revocation occurred. Only present if revoked is true.

revocation_reason.description: Human-readable explanation for why the DIVT was revoked. Only present if revoked is true.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the DIVT was created.

RegisterRequest.description: Request payload for POST /v1/register - creates a new DIVT.

content.description: Base64-encoded content to hash. Mutually exclusive with hash_b64. Maximum 1MB decoded.

hash_b64.description: Pre-computed base64-encoded SHA3-512 hash. Mutually exclusive with content.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary JSON metadata (max 4KB). NOT included in hash calculation.

VerifyRequest.description: Request payload for POST /v1/verify - verifies content against a DIVT.

divt_id.description: ID of the DIVT to verify against.

content.description: Base64-encoded content to verify. Mutually exclusive with hash_b64.

hash_b64.description: Pre-computed base64-encoded SHA3-512 hash to verify. Mutually exclusive with content.

VerifyResult.description: Response for POST /v1/verify - detailed verification results.

verified.description: True if all checks pass: hash matches, signatures valid, not revoked.

hash_match.description: True if the provided content hash matches the stored hash.

ecdsa_valid.description: True if the ECDSA P-521 signature verification passed (or not required by crypto_mode).

pqc_valid.description: True if the ML-DSA-65 signature verification passed (or not required by crypto_mode).

revoked.description: True if the DIVT has been revoked.

revoked_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of revocation. Only present if revoked is true.

revocation_reason.description: Reason for revocation. Only present if revoked is true.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why verification failed. Only present if verified is false.

RevokeRequest.description: Request payload for POST /v1/divts/{id}/revoke - revokes a DIVT.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for why the DIVT is being revoked.

PublicKeyInfo.description: Public key information returned by GET /keys/list.

is_current.description: True if this is the current signing key.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this key was generated.

LicenseHealthResponse.description: License status information in health response.

operational.description: True if the license allows the system to operate.

WorldStateHealthResponse.description: World State health information. Only present when WORLDSTATE_ENABLED=true.

enabled.description: True if World State feature is enabled.

queue_size.description: Current number of pending events in the queue.

healthy.description: True if all crypto self-tests pass.

fips_provider.description: True if FIPS-validated crypto provider is in use.

keys_present.description: True if signing keys are loaded.

last_test.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when tests were last run.

failures.description: List of which checks failed (if any).

CryptoTestResults.description: Detailed results for each cryptographic self-test.

CryptoTestResult.description: Result of a single cryptographic self-test.

error.description: Error message if the test failed.

DIVTCounts.description: DIVT count statistics returned by internal APIs.

description: Root schema object - use $defs for individual type references.
